footer.newsletterIntro: Get upcoming tournaments and rankings in your inbox. Zero spam, once a week.
footer.newsletterRevisaDesc: We sent you an email with a confirmation link. Click it and you're in.

inicio.subtitulo: Vote head-to-head in brackets. Predict who advances and unlock achievements. Live ELO ranking, updated instantly.
inicio.comoFuncionaSub: Three steps to put data behind your anime arguments.
inicio.paso1Desc: Each match pits two characters. Pick the winner and AnimeShowdown updates both ELO scores instantly.
inicio.paso2Desc: When a tournament is live, predict who advances in each bracket. Build a streak and unlock badges.
inicio.paso3Desc: Browse the global ranking, filter by anime, and compare yourself against other users from their public profile.

torneos.subtitulo: Head-to-head brackets between catalog characters. Open any tournament to see the full roster and match status.
torneos.errorFallback: Try again in a few seconds.
torneos.vacio: No active tournaments yet. The auto-tournament cron runs every 3 days.

votar.subtituloPagina: Pick the winner of each matchup.

personajes.subtituloPagina: Full catalog with stats by anime.
